model_form: conservative nearest-neighbor axial thermal exchange across left_lower_vertical test_section left_upper_vertical
physical_hypothesis: Bulk streamwise thermal communication is underrepresented; a setup-bounded axial-dispersion term may reduce wall/test-section/passive-boundary temperature-shape error without using validation fields.
why_this_candidate: Smallest non-retread change after TSWFC2 and UMX1 exchange failed score behavior.
next_gate: Patch Fluid then run Salt2 smoke only.
stop_condition: Reject if finite roots fail or axial-mixing ledger is zero/energy-nonconservative.

model_form: AMX1a plus existing UMX1 reservoir exchange
physical_hypothesis: Main-path axial thermal exchange and stratified reservoir exchange may both be needed; exchange alone was not enough.
why_this_candidate: Combines accepted UMX1 root substrate with a new axial diffusion term.
next_gate: Try only after AMX1a smoke passes.
stop_condition: Reject if AMX1a does not smoke or combined residuals are nonconservative.

model_form: AMX1a plus bounded junction mixing reset at lower/test/upper interfaces
physical_hypothesis: A short development/mixing reset at geometry transitions may explain probe-local shape residuals.
why_this_candidate: More complex and easier to overfit; keep behind AMX1a/AMX1b evidence.
next_gate: Design dry contract only after AMX1a or AMX1b ledger behavior is useful.
stop_condition: Reject if it needs validation-temperature tuning.

model_form: distributed wall/fluid nodes with axial wall conduction
physical_hypothesis: Wall axial conduction may redistribute heat near TW5/TW6 and heated incline regions.
why_this_candidate: Secondary because four-node TSWFC2 already failed coupled score gates without a new axial-coupling mechanism.
next_gate: Defer until AMX1 smoke/scorecard evidence says fluid axial mixing is insufficient.
stop_condition: Reject if it repeats TSWFC2 with only parameter changes.
